headline: Andoni Iraola
body: Andoni Iraola is linked with a managerial move to Newcastle.
text:
Liverpool face a tough trip to Newcastle United to get the Andoni Iraola regime underway - and it is not long before their new manager returns to his old club, Bournemouth.

That south-coast reunion kicks off a tough run of fixtures, with Liverpool facing both of last season’s top two in October.
draft_caption:
Unconfirmed report
RUMOUR | Andoni Iraola

Andoni Iraola is linked with a managerial move to Newcastle.
